subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1915-05-20
subcodes.first_line: His real name was Mirza Muhammad Qa'ini. He was a man of great spirituality and wit. Long before the appearance of the Báb from Shiraz
subcodes.subjects: @humor; jokes, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @stories; anecdotes, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
